items_verified.label: Cluster selector defaults to first healthy cluster
items_verified.notes: Services and Namespaces pages auto-select vlk-minikube (healthy cluster). Deployments page shows 'Select Cluster' and fails to load data. Logs page also does not auto-select cluster.

items_verified.label: Table rows have hover states (hover:bg-muted/50)
items_verified.notes: Confirmed via CSS eval: tbody tr elements have class 'hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors'

items_verified.label: Table headers use text-xs font-medium NOT uppercase mono
items_verified.notes: Confirmed: th elements have class 'text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground select-none'. No uppercase mono present.

items_verified.label: Sidebar active state uses subtle bg-primary/10
items_verified.notes: Active item uses bg-[var(--color-accent)]/10 — subtle 10% opacity tint, not aggressive solid. Semantically equivalent to bg-primary/10.

items_verified.label: Pages have consistent PageHeader with title/breadcrumb
items_verified.notes: Services, Namespaces, Anomalies, Deployments all have PageHeader with title + breadcrumb (home icon > page name) + subtitle description.

items_verified.label: Empty states are contextual with descriptions and CTAs
items_verified.notes: Deployments shows 'No deployments found for selected namespace' with icon — contextual description present but NO CTA button. Deployments error state shows raw Zod JSON validation error instead of user-friendly message. Missing action buttons.

items_verified.label: Dashboard stat card numbers are large (text-3xl font-semibold)
items_verified.notes: Confirmed via CSS eval: stat card numbers have class 'text-3xl font-semibold tabular-nums tracking-tight leading-tight animate-count-up gradient-text'

items_verified.label: Pages have smooth fade-in animation on load
items_verified.notes: Page content wrapper uses style='opacity: 1; transform: none;' indicating framer-motion animation completed. Fade-in present on all tested pages.

issues.title: Cluster selector does not auto-select healthy cluster
issues.description: Deployments page loads with 'Select Cluster' instead of defaulting to vlk-minikube (healthy cluster). Services and Namespaces correctly auto-select.
issues.expected: Cluster selector defaults to first healthy cluster (vlk-minikube)
issues.actual: Shows 'Select Cluster' — user must manually select a cluster

issues.title: Raw Zod validation error displayed to user
issues.description: Deployments page shows raw JSON Zod error: [{"expected":"string","code":"invalid_type","path":["accessKeyId"]...}] instead of a user-friendly error message
issues.expected: User-friendly error message with retry CTA
issues.actual: Raw validation JSON error displayed in UI

issues.title: Empty states lack CTA buttons
issues.description: Empty states show contextual messages but no action buttons to guide users (e.g. 'Select a cluster' or 'Configure cluster' CTA)
issues.expected: Empty state with description + CTA button
issues.actual: Empty state with description only, no action buttons
